turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, thank you. And do you remember any specific details about the wallet, like its color or brand, or any items inside that might help us identify it?

turns.text: Thank you for that information. That definitely helps us get a clear picture. If there's anything else you recall, just let me know, and we’ll do our best to assist you.

turns.text: Alright, that’s helpful to know. We’ll make a note of that time. If you remember any other details later on, just let us know, and we’ll keep you updated. Transcript Unavailable

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: If someone finds it, we’ll do our best to contact you as soon as possible, and we’ll keep it safe here at the station. If you have any concerns or need further assistance, just let us know!

turns.text: Perfect, thank you for that. We’ll keep that on file, and we’ll be in touch if we have any updates. If there’s anything else you need, just let us know!

turns.text: Yes, we’ll have a simple form for you to fill out with all the details we discussed. I can guide you through it, and it won’t take long at all. Let me know whenever you’re ready!

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Typically, we keep lost items for a period of about 30 days, and if they’re not claimed within that time, we follow the standard procedures for disposal or donation. But we’ll definitely keep you updated along the way!
